summary: The team is executing a major China Going-Global report launch and SEO-driven program prioritization, with Asia Star and Intelligent China as top marketing priorities, while navigating urgent password issues and a knowledge website redesign.
summaryDetail: The most critical initiative is the joint report with IE Business School on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, targeting a September launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson event in Singapore. The team is translating the report, collecting alumni case studies, and confirming partnerships. Concurrently, SEO strategy prioritizes Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships, with conversion tracking audits underway. Urgent this week: resolving Outlook password lockout issues affecting team access, and finalizing the knowledge website homepage by merging Joker's and Joseph's designs. Upcoming: expediting social media agency selection (Media Minds prioritized), launching the Indonesia Emerging Markets program webpage, and processing UNICON membership invoice.

meetings.title: 邮箱账号与设备登录问题讨论
meetings.summary: 讨论邮箱账号因设备使用旧密码导致被锁定的问题，并指导重新登录和更新密码。

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting
meetings.summary: Discussion about worship and a three-story hall, possibly related to a marketing event or venue.

meetings.title: Knowledge Website Redesign Review
meetings.summary: Team reviewed Joker's knowledge website redesign, noting it's similar to current site with menu improvements. Discussed Joseph's alternative layout showing more articles and indices, and agreed to combine ideas.

meetings.title: SEO & Program Prioritization Strategy
meetings.summary: Team discusses SEO strategy to improve CKGSB's search ranking for programs in AI, EVs, and smart manufacturing in China, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting - June 29, 2026
meetings.summary: Team discussed feedback on menu categorization, school brochure updates, CES quotes for social media, Ding Hight Hall video, Asia Start articles, Davos press release, social media agency search, and IE report translation. Decisions made on Shun Tian Shu press release approach and prioritizing Media Minds for social media.

meetings.title: Joint Report on Chinese Companies Going Global
meetings.summary: Team discusses co-publishing a report on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with a main research piece from Professor Leeway and op-eds from both schools. They plan to launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson event in Singapore in mid-September.

decisions.meetingTitle: 邮箱账号与设备登录问题讨论

decisions.text: Remove dedicated video section; videos will be dispersed by topic.
Combine elements from Joker's and Joseph's designs for final homepage.
Show more articles on homepage, with pinned article and latest articles.
Bring indices (BCI, BSI) to knowledge homepage.
Asia Star and Intelligent China are top priority programs for marketing.
US partnerships (Berkeley, Stanford, Columbia) are secondary; Berkeley is third priority if resources allow.
Shun Tian Shu press release will be a single piece, either incorporating 10 points or turning into a 10-point article.
Prioritize Media Minds as social media agency due to budget constraints and time sensitivity.
Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE Business School.

decisions.text: Target launch at either Tech in Asia (Sep 15-16) or Tyson event (Sep 29-30) in Singapore.
